name: Risotto with Sun-Dried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Sun-dried tomatoes, marinated in oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the broth and maintain it at a simmer.
2. In another saucepan, melt 2 tablespoons of butter.
3. Add the garlic and shallot, and sauté until limp, about 2 minutes.
4. Add the rice and stir to coat with the melted butter.
5. Add the wine and cook, stirring occasionally, until the wine is absorbed.
6. Add 1/4 cup of the broth and cook over medium heat until the broth is absorbed.
7. Continue to cook, adding 1/4 cup of broth at a time, stirring occasionally, until all the broth has been absorbed.
8. When all the broth is absorbed, stir in the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter.
9. Stir in the sun-dried tomatoes, cheese, and parsley.
10. Season with salt and pepper.
11. Serve immediately.
